title: Joby Reports Fourth Quarter 2025 Financial Results
text: Joby Aviation reported Q4 2025 financial results and provided full-year 2025 guidance. JOBY reported an earnings per share of -$0.14, which exceeded analysts' expectations of -$0.20 by 30%. The company reported on February 25, 2026 for Q4 2025, posting the stronger-than-expected EPS. For full year 2025, revenue reached US$53.4 million. Joby had strong financial position with $1.4 billion in cash and short-term investments as of Q4 2025, plus an additional net $1.2 billion received in February 2026. Total cash position exceeded $2.5 billion including the new capital raise. The company achieved significant regulatory milestones including completing its SR3 audit with the FAA. Manufacturing ramped significantly with composites production running at more than 2.5 times the prior year's volume. The company maintained focus on 2026 commercialization goals including launch in Dubai and operations in the White House eIPP program states. The company ended the year with strong operational momentum heading into 2026, with manufacturing, certification, and commercial partnership developments progressing ahead of schedule.
